python sdk_handshake.py
stdout 'SDK_HANDSHAKE_OK'

-- sdk_handshake.py --
import os

import httpx
from tinker import ServiceClient


base_url = os.environ["TINKER_BASE_URL"]
client = ServiceClient()
try:
    caps = client.get_server_capabilities()
    assert caps.supported_models, caps
    model = caps.supported_models[0]
    assert model.model_name == "Qwen/Qwen3-8B", model

    rest = client.create_rest_client()
    runs = rest.list_training_runs(limit=1).result(timeout=120)
    assert runs.cursor.total_count == 0, runs
    checkpoints = rest.list_user_checkpoints(limit=1).result(timeout=120)
    assert checkpoints.cursor.total_count == 0, checkpoints

    raw = httpx.post(
        f"{base_url}/api/v1/retrieve_future",
        json={"request_id": "missing"},
        timeout=5,
    )
    assert raw.status_code == 404, raw.text
    body = raw.json()
    assert body["status"] == "error", body
    assert body["code"] == "not_found", body

    print("SDK_HANDSHAKE_OK")
finally:
    client.holder.close()
